Chapter 01 : Whispers in the Walls
The Last Silence by ImadChelloufi

In the year 2080, after the Great Biological War, the world as we knew it came to an end. Cities turned to ash, and the air became a deadly poison.

Ryan spoke quietly as he looked through the ventilation hole. "Not yet. Not while they're watching."

The silence pressed in around him like a living thing.

3
